• HTML5-based MIDI sequencer with audio visualization
  • Loads audio samples and MIDI files from local library or uploads
  • Real-time waveform visualization using Tone.js
  • Speed and pitch controls with shareable configuration links
  • Offline WAV export functionality
    const sampler = new Tone.Sampler({ urls: { C4: url } });
    const player = new MidiPlayer.Player((event) => { /* trigger notes */ });

This MIDI sequencer combines Tone.js audio engine with MidiPlayer.js for playback. Users can select from pre-loaded libraries or upload custom audio/MIDI files, adjust playback speed and pitch in real-time, and export compositions as WAV files. The interface features a live waveform visualizer and generates shareable links with current settings.
